channel.title: Posts on Shulei's Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Shulei's Site

item.title: 🚚 Supply Chain & Business Podcasts Worth Your Time
item.description: A few podcasts I’ve been exploring to better understand supply chain, logistics, and the business of moving goods around the world.

item.title: 🎨 Making My Avatar
item.description: Interesting and cute avatar maker: Notion Avatar Maker!

item.title: 🎧 Data Analytics Podcasts I Listen To
item.description: Here’s a collection of data analytics podcasts I enjoy — for learning, relaxing, or just staying inspired.
